title: CheckTaskGeneratorMismatchSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``check-task-generator-mismatch`` validate verb (WS5 #9).

Canonical-JSON compare between a caller-supplied ``task_generator`` and
the cached/derived one (the ``interview.json`` generator left in
``experiment_dir`` from earlier dev work). The comparison is by canonical
content — both shapes are normalized with key-sorted, whitespace-free
JSON — so two generators that differ only in key order compare equal.

Each generator is accepted as a JSON object string on the CLI (parsed
before canonicalization); the in-process Python entry point also accepts
an already-parsed object. ``cached_task_generator`` is optional: omit it
when no cached generator exists, and the match is vacuously true (the
caller's generator is authoritative with nothing to diverge from).

caller_task_generator.title: Caller Task Generator
caller_task_generator.description: Caller-supplied task_generator (this invocation's authoritative shape). On the CLI, a JSON object string.

cached_task_generator.title: Cached Task Generator
cached_task_generator.description: Cached/derived task_generator (e.g. from interview.json), or null when none exists. When null the match is vacuously true.
